features: FAST ACTING, EFFECTIVE RELIEF -- Helps to relieve the symptoms of hayfever and other allergies such as sneezing, runny nose and burning, itchy eyes, hives or nettle rash.
NO DROWSINESS -- Tests have shown that Cetirizine Galpharm does not cause drowsiness in the vast majority of people using it.
CONVENIENT -- Easy to use one tablet per day formula.
MULTI-USE -- Can also be taken for skin allergies, dust allergies, pet allergies.
Package contains: 2x 7 Galpharm Cetirizine 10mg Hayfever and Allergy Relief Tablets. The actual packaging may vary.
description: Product description Experience relief from hayfever and symptoms of other allergies with Galpharm Hayfever and Allergy Relief. The Cetirizine Hydrochloride one-a-day tablet helps treat symptoms of all-year-round allergies caused by pets and dust mites, as well as skin rashes. Please read the enclosed leaflet carefully before use. To relieve the symptoms of haylever and other allergies e.g. pet or house dust mite allergies. Can also be taken for skin allergies such as rash, eching and hives. Dose: For oral use to be swallowed whole with water. Adults and children aged 12 years and above: Take one tablet once as day. Children aged 6 to 12 years: Take half a tablet twice a day. Do not give to children under 6 years of age. Do not take more medicine than the label tells you to. Warnings: If symptoms persist consult your doctor. Do not use if you are pregnant, breast-feeding or have serious kidney problems. Keep out of the sight and reach of children. These tablets do not normally cause drowsiness. However, individuals can react differently so if you are affected, you should not drive or operate machinery. Do not give to children under of the age of 6. Do not exceed the recommended dose. Safety Warning Read the leaflet and follow the directions. If symptoms persist consult your doctor.
